name: iolla-desktop
description: Aplicativo desktop IOLLA para gerenciamento de pedidos, WhatsApp e trocas.
author: OpenAI Codex

scripts.dist: npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.pack: npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.publish:mac: node scripts/validate-publish-env.mjs && npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --publish always
scripts.publish:win: node scripts/validate-publish-env.mjs && npm run build:icons && npm run build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64 --publish always
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags
